pre.code: Redux Provider LichessGameProvider BrowserRouter route / → UnifiedChessContainer route /auth/callback → AuthCallback
render UnifiedChessContainer: control panels (Appearance, Setup, Moves) main view (board / graph / arc / chord / graphdag) history view (move table or metrics chart)
D3.js renders updated visualization URL params synced via useUrlSync hook
token stored in localStorage enables game streaming and challenges
